metadata.description: Multi-agent workflow for Claude Code where discipline is enforced by hooks, not personas. 22 subagents with strict role separation, context isolation, and nonce-proof reads.

plugins.name: fsm-workflow
plugins.description: 22-agent FSM pipeline. Marketplace install ships agents, commands, and templates only. Run the /fsm-setup-hooks command after install to complete the enforcement layer (hooks cannot be installed via the plugin marketplace and are required for the full package).
